basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) has released an official notification for Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates can apply online for 05 vacancies from 01-06-2026 to 15-06-2026. Read the complete details about eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, and how to apply below.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01.01.2023

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 12th pass (10+2 Standard) and knowledge of Odisha language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 05 Posts
